reviews.comment:
Hla siempre que podemos vamos a pasear x San Martin .soy socia del ACA la  limpieza de los baños exelente .la atencion muy buena tanto como el chico que atiende en el local como los playeros y siempre hay gente x la zona muy concurrida y uno entiende  .pasa x todos lados mas siendo una zona turistica .

(Translated by Google)
Hi, whenever we can we go for a walk in San Martin. I'm a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). The cleanliness of the bathrooms is excellent. The service is very good, both from the guy who works at the shop and the beach attendants. There are always people in the area, it's very busy, and you understand that. People pass by everywhere, especially since it's a tourist area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPcU51RFBBEAE
